summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided; each open PR is useful contributor work with distinct scope, so no close, merge, fix, or label mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Distinct useful PR with active validation/author-followup state; not a duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, low-signal, or security item.
Broad but useful feature PR with its own product/technical review path; no hydrated canonical or replacement path supports closeout.
Focused useful bug-fix PR remains independently reviewable; failed proof prevents any stronger closeout or merge recommendation.
Useful independent memory-core fix with no hydrated duplicate/superseding candidate; keep open for normal maintainer review.
Focused useful config bug-fix PR remains independently reviewable; failed proof prevents any stronger closeout or merge recommendation.
